title: ThreadSanitizer: lock-order-inversion with database rename
description:
### Describe the bug
Seen here: https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/json.html?PR=83888&sha=f491532fc03a9c68b1d0ef46f1d01bbcd6f76a38&name_0=PR&name_1=BuzzHouse+%28amd_tsan%29
### How to reproduce
On a TSAN build run:
```sql
CREATE DATABASE d0 ENGINE = Atomic;
ALTER DATABASE d0 MODIFY COMMENT 'a';
RENAME DATABASE d0 TO d1;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
==================
WARNING: ThreadSanitizer: lock-order-inversion (potential deadlock) (pid=2992926)
Cycle in lock order graph: M0 (0x727400001e10) => M1 (0x725400070330) => M0
Mutex M1 acquired here while holding mutex M0 in thread T8:
#0 pthread_mutex_lock <null> (clickhouse+0x92751ce) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#1 std::__1::__libcpp_mutex_lock[abi:ne190107](pthread_mutex_t*) contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__thread/support/pthread.h:95:10 (clickhouse+0x2cbe7599) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#2 std::__1::mutex::lock() contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/src/mutex.cpp:29:12 (clickhouse+0x2cbe7599)
#3 std::__1::lock_guard<std::__1::mutex>::lock_guard[abi:ne190107](std::__1::mutex&) contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__mutex/lock_guard.h:33:10 (clickhouse+0x1af599ce) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#4 DB::DatabaseOnDisk::getCreateDatabaseQuery() const src/Databases/DatabaseOnDisk.cpp:568:25 (clickhouse+0x1af599ce)
#5 DB::DatabaseCatalog::updateMetadataFile(std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::IDatabase> const&) src/Interpreters/DatabaseCatalog.cpp:710:28 (clickhouse+0x1c52389c) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#6 DB::updateDatabaseCommentWithMetadataFile(std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::IDatabase>, DB::AlterCommand const&) src/Databases/DatabasesCommon.cpp:344:37 (clickhouse+0x1affdb4d) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#7 DB::DatabaseOnDisk::alterDatabaseComment(DB::AlterCommand const&) src/Databases/DatabaseOnDisk.cpp:926:5 (clickhouse+0x1af5ead2) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#8 DB::InterpreterAlterQuery::executeToDatabase(DB::ASTAlterQuery const&) src/Interpreters/InterpreterAlterQuery.cpp:332:31 (clickhouse+0x1c63667a) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#9 DB::InterpreterAlterQuery::execute() src/Interpreters/InterpreterAlterQuery.cpp:78:16 (clickhouse+0x1c635f72) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#10 DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::__1::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::__1::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>, std::__1::function<void ()>) src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1603:40 (clickhouse+0x1cbdf900) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#11 DB::executeQuery(std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>> const&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum) src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1812:11 (clickhouse+0x1cbd968d) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#12 DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:743:68 (clickhouse+0x226111f4) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#13 DB::TCPHandler::run() src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2754:9 (clickhouse+0x2263a167) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#14 Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40:3 (clickhouse+0x2b52f822) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#15 Poco::Net::TCPServerDispatcher::run() base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerDispatcher.cpp:115:38 (clickhouse+0x2b5300f1) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#16 Poco::PooledThread::run() base/poco/Foundation/src/ThreadPool.cpp:205:14 (clickhouse+0x2b49ed10) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#17 Poco::(anonymous namespace)::RunnableHolder::run() base/poco/Foundation/src/Thread.cpp:45:11 (clickhouse+0x2b49ceef) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#18 Poco::ThreadImpl::runnableEntry(void*) base/poco/Foundation/src/Thread_POSIX.cpp:341:27 (clickhouse+0x2b49b149) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
Mutex M0 previously acquired by the same thread here:
#0 pthread_mutex_lock <null> (clickhouse+0x92751ce) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#1 std::__1::__libcpp_mutex_lock[abi:ne190107](pthread_mutex_t*) contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__thread/support/pthread.h:95:10 (clickhouse+0x2cbe7599) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#2 std::__1::mutex::lock() contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/src/mutex.cpp:29:12 (clickhouse+0x2cbe7599)
#3 std::__1::lock_guard<std::__1::mutex>::lock_guard[abi:ne190107](std::__1::mutex&) contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__mutex/lock_guard.h:33:10 (clickhouse+0x1c523875) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#4 DB::DatabaseCatalog::updateMetadataFile(std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::IDatabase> const&) src/Interpreters/DatabaseCatalog.cpp:709:21 (clickhouse+0x1c523875)
#5 DB::updateDatabaseCommentWithMetadataFile(std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::IDatabase>, DB::AlterCommand const&) src/Databases/DatabasesCommon.cpp:344:37 (clickhouse+0x1affdb4d) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#6 DB::DatabaseOnDisk::alterDatabaseComment(DB::AlterCommand const&) src/Databases/DatabaseOnDisk.cpp:926:5 (clickhouse+0x1af5ead2) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#7 DB::InterpreterAlterQuery::executeToDatabase(DB::ASTAlterQuery const&) src/Interpreters/InterpreterAlterQuery.cpp:332:31 (clickhouse+0x1c63667a) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#8 DB::InterpreterAlterQuery::execute() src/Interpreters/InterpreterAlterQuery.cpp:78:16 (clickhouse+0x1c635f72) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#9 DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::__1::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::__1::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>, std::__1::function<void ()>) src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1603:40 (clickhouse+0x1cbdf900) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#10 DB::executeQuery(std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>> const&, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum) src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1812:11 (clickhouse+0x1cbd968d) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#11 DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:743:68 (clickhouse+0x226111f4) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)
#12 DB::TCPHandler::run() src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2754:9 (clickhouse+0x2263a167) (BuildId: d5b0c65fac7a427696a3ed5efcaf9819985da404)

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE d2.table1 (id INT UNSIGNED, name VARCHAR(255), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ALTER DATABASE d2 COMMENT 'Test database for fuzzing';
key_bug_features: RENAME DATABASE while modifying comment causes deadlock
